compositions.semantic_intent: Deliver a direct corrective or provocative claim with one dominant focal scene.
Turn a high-signal interview line into a human-centered authority or emotional quote.
Present attributed commentary or social proof inside a familiar social-post shell.
Create a premium, high-contrast statement card with almost no visual noise.
Make one abstract claim immediately understandable through a single visual proof.
Create emotional identification through one protagonist embedded in a meaningful scene.
Enlarge the consequence of inaction without losing clarity or ethical restraint.
Compare two concepts with readable visual parity in a light editorial treatment.
Compare two concepts with dramatic, premium visual contrast.
Force a clear audience choice between two visually comparable options.
Turn a poll into an identity or aspiration choice with psychologically meaningful outcomes.
Provide a tall, platform-native two-option poll with more visual room for each choice.
Compare two roles, identities, people, or approaches with evidence below each side.
Create a fast, provocative binary debate with minimal explanation.
Express one broad principle through a single illustrated scene and moral statement.
Pair a character archetype with a concise thesis or identity claim.
Use an oversized object or symbolic system to embody an abstract lesson.
Show two outcomes, behaviors, or realities in parallel illustrated panels.
Organize three examples, stages, or mistakes into a readable vertical progression.
Teach four principles, states, or situations through a balanced 2x2 visual system.
Express a journey, development process, or timeline as a path, ladder, or staged system.
Frame relational or social tension with a human illustration and emotionally precise claim.
Show a decision point or two possible futures inside a single coherent visual field.
Present multiple sports images and statistics in a fast, highly legible collage.
Use emotional sports photography and a quote to create a reaction or news commentary asset.
Announce a live interview, broadcast, or event with clear metadata and human authority.
Create a more restrained expert, episode, or event poster with premium whitespace.
Frame a post, comment, or social proof object as the target of a branded response.
